metadata.title: MD7X-00-009200 - MongoDB security-relevant software updates must be installed within the timeframe directed by authoritative sources.
metadata.description: Checks that net.tls.disabledProtocols is configured to disable legacy TLS 1.0 and TLS 1.1 in mongod.conf. Explicitly disabling obsolete protocols demonstrates that the system is maintained to current cryptographic standards, consistent with timely application of security-relevant updates.

ind:textfilecontent54_test.comment: disabledProtocols includes TLS1_0 and TLS1_1 in mongod.conf
